## **TZ1.3. SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **TZ1.3.1. ENAV NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE ITALY TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 1 IN 2025**

ENAV reported a net gain of +2.3 M€, as a combination of a gain of +4.0 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a loss of -1.9 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a gain of +0.2 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **TZ1.3.2. ENAV OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) ON ACTIVITY IN THE TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 1**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net gain from the terminal activity mentioned above (+2.3 M€) and the actual RoE (+4.5 M€), amounts to +6.8 M€ (7.6% of the terminal revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 11.4%, which is higher than the 7.6% planned in the PP.

### **TZ1.3.3. NOTES**

#### **TZ1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **TZ1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**

# **TZ2. TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE - ITALY ZONE 2**
